spec.reasoning: The task references specific cell addresses (C2:C4, column A, B, C) which are risk-flagged, so I avoid blank_row_insert or title_row_insert that would shift rows. The instruction mentions 'item/items' as general English words describing the data, not as column name references, so renaming the column headers (which use different phrasing) is safe.
